description_long: This is a rectangular kitchen or utility sink with a single deep basin on the left and an integrated draining board on the right. The sink features a high-arched, metallic faucet with a pull-down spray head, mounted above the basin. The basin has a central drain with a visible strainer and a small overflow hole near the top edge. The draining board is ribbed for water runoff and is slightly sloped toward the basin. The sink's surface appears to be made of a glossy, white ceramic or enameled material, with the faucet and drain components in metallic finishes. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for installation in kitchens, utility rooms, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern white sink with a single deep basin, integrated draining board, and a high-arched metallic faucet. The surface is glossy and features a central drain and overflow hole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep basin, faucet, and drain with overflow hole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the full length of the draining board.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the faucet and the flat draining board, with the basin less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the draining board's ribbed surface and the basin's profile.
